title: German Telematics Infrastructure - Healthcare Connectivity
problem: German healthcare needs standardized electronic connectivity between providers, insurers, and patients.
solution: Telematics infrastructure connecting all German healthcare stakeholders. Electronic health card (eGK), electronic prescriptions, secure messaging. Basis for healthcare data exchange.
technology: eGK smart cards, secure network infrastructure, electronic prescriptions
target_customer: All German healthcare providers and insurers
varden_fit: CRITICAL — German telematics proves infrastructure exists but lacks advanced eligibility and prior auth automation. This is the opportunity layer.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Infrastructure exists but no one has built eligibility verification or prior auth on top. This is the blue ocean.
